improvement: Added an executable GitHub Actions OIDC evidence runner that requests a scoped token, retrieves pinned metadata, verifies the RSA signature, authorizes exact workflow claims against an invocation receipt, and emits a sanitized decision artifact without persisting either token.

verification.runtime_limit: Fresh checkout failed because github.com DNS resolution was unavailable in the execution runtime.

security_properties: Bearer request credential used only for the GitHub token endpoint
OIDC JWT never included in returned or written artifact
request credential never included in returned or written artifact
exact repository, workflow, ref, environment, run, actor, and source SHA matching
pinned GitHub issuer, JWKS URL, and RS256 verification
fail-closed decision when signature or claim authorization fails
trust_limits: The runner is not yet wired into the deployment workflow.
No Cloudflare deployment success or served identity was proven.
No scientific, diagnostic, or treatment claim is established by OIDC acceptance.
privacy_boundary: No private chat, health data, credentials, token values, or identifying user material was written to the repository.
